summary: Vendor Ops Foundation testing complete. All 15 features verified. Backend: 28/28 tests pass. Frontend: All 3 tabs (Vendors, Products, Price Requests) working with proper data-testid attributes, stats banner, and status badges.
test_credentials: Admin: admin@konekt.co.tz / KnktcKk_L-hw1wSyquvd!, Staff: staff@konekt.co.tz / Staff123!
seed_data_creation: Created test products (TEST_VendorOps_Product_307) and price requests (TEST_Custom_Printing_Service_307) during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Vendor Ops Foundation fully implemented and tested. Key features: 1) Image pipeline generates WebP variants at 200px, 600px, 1200px (thumbnail, card, detail). 2) Products CRUD tracks created_by_role and updated_by_role. 3) Price requests auto-transition from pending_vendor_response to response_received when base_price is set. 4) Role enforcement: admin/super_admin/vendor_ops get access, sales role gets 403. 5) Dashboard at /admin/vendor-ops with 3 tabs. 6) Stats banner shows vendor/product/request counts.

backend_apis.POST /api/vendor-ops/images/upload: PASS - Processes image with crop + generates WebP variants
backend_apis.POST /api/vendor-ops/products: PASS - Creates product with images, variants, vendor assignment
backend_apis.PUT /api/vendor-ops/products/{id}: PASS - Updates product with updated_by_role tracking
backend_apis.GET /api/vendor-ops/products: PASS - Lists products with status filter
backend_apis.POST /api/vendor-ops/price-requests: PASS - Creates request with pending_vendor_response status
backend_apis.PUT /api/vendor-ops/price-requests/{id}: PASS - Updates with base_price and auto-transitions to response_received

role_enforcement.admin_access: PASS - Admin can access all vendor-ops endpoints
role_enforcement.staff_sales_blocked: PASS - Staff with sales role gets 403 on all vendor-ops endpoints

image_validation.webp_variants_generated: PASS - thumbnail (200px), card (600px), detail (1200px) variants created

frontend_ui.vendor_ops_page: PASS - Page loads at /admin/vendor-ops with data-testid='vendor-ops-page'
frontend_ui.stats_banner: PASS - Shows vendor/product/request counts with data-testid='ops-stats'
frontend_ui.vendors_tab: PASS - Shows vendors table with data-testid='vendors-table'
frontend_ui.products_tab: PASS - Shows products table with image status, stock, variants indicator
frontend_ui.price_requests_tab: PASS - Shows requests table with status badges
frontend_ui.filter_buttons: PASS - All, Active, Draft, Pending Review filters work

image_pipeline_verification.crop_support: PASS - Crop parameters (x, y, width, height) work correctly
